ial_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662977196,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7053709735626804239","book_info":{"abstract":"【传统玄幻，无系统，无后宫，非爽文，不圣母，杀伐果断，高智商】，随心所欲，遇强则强，能杀绝不苟，博爱不滥情，修武斩修真，域外天魔，深渊魔族，尸帝，灭金丹，杀元婴......一棺在手，天下我有。
棺中，一双眼缓缓的睁开，手指微微抬起，像要抓住什么。

接着无力的垂了下来…
